design_philosophy.identity: E1: The Anti-AI Designer - Luxury Tech Edition
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'High Fashion' elegance with 'Data Science' precision.
Content is King: Your projects are the crown jewels; the UI is the velvet cushion.
Negative Space: Use 3x more whitespace than you think is necessary.
Contrast: Deep Obsidian backgrounds vs. Sharp Platinum text.

colors.theme_strategy: Luxury Dark Mode (Primary) + High-End Light Mode (Secondary)

usage_rules.gradients: Use extremely subtle, noise-textured gradients. No harsh linear gradients.
usage_rules.borders: 1px borders with 5-10% opacity are key for the 'Technical' look.

layout_strategy.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-12, py-24 for section padding.

buttons.class: px-8 py-3 bg-white text-black dark:bg-white dark:text-black font-medium transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)]

cards.style: Glassmorphism Lite. Dark background with slight transparency + blur.
cards.hover: Border becomes Gold (#D4AF37) with low opacity on hover. No lift.

inputs.border: Border-bottom only for a 'clean' look, or bg-surface-highlight with no border.

hero.instruction: Center-aligned or Split. Use 'FloatingProfilePhoto' but make it subtle. Replace 'RoleTypewriter' with a smooth fade-in text.
hero.background: Use a subtle 'MorphingBackground' (very slow, dark colors) or just a clean dark gradient with noise.

stats.instruction: Minimalist numbers. Thin font weights. Label below number.

projects.instruction: Bento Grid layout. Image covers 60% of card. Text below. Hover reveals tech stack.

experience.instruction: Timeline with a 'Gold' center line. Cards alternating left/right on desktop.

skills.instruction: Radar Chart is fine, but style it 'Technical' (thin lines, monochrome with 1 accent color). Avoid rainbow charts.

principles: Scroll Reveal: Use 'WhileInView' with viewport margin -10%.

images.hero_bg: Abstract data visualization, dark, luxurious, network nodes, gold lines
images.profile_placeholder: Professional headshot, studio lighting, monochrome or desaturated

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
implementation_steps: 1. Update tailwind.config.js with new colors (Luxury Dark) and fonts (Playfair, Manrope).
2. Refactor 'globals.css' to add global styles (Noise texture, smooth scroll).
3. Revamp 'Hero' component: Remove Glitch, add clean typography.
5. Style 'Experience' section with a refined Timeline.
